title: What tools do you use to interact with API systems
excerpt: A few weeks ago, we were getting into crunch-time to get users names and emails related to a certain subject into Monday. We had data that we wanted to enter in. I remember pulling my hair out trying formulate an API tha…

posts.author: Nathan208 (Nathan Weber)
posts.cookedHtml:
A few weeks ago, we were getting into crunch-time to get users names and emails related to a certain subject into Monday. We had data that we wanted to enter in. I remember pulling my hair out trying formulate an API that plays well with Monday. we ended up crafting a very specifically useful script that did just what we needed but nothing more.

My question, is there a better way? is there a python plugin that you use or a company you go through that makes transferring information to and from Monday more convenient. What is your workflow? How do you connect to Monday API?
